mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STORE_BOARD_TBL (MARKET_NO, BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, PRODUCT_STATUS, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE) VALUES (STORE_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{ctpvsggId}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, #{productPrice}, #{productThumb}, #{productStatus}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, #{tradeType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND IS_DELETED = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STORE_BOARD_TRADEINFO_TBL (TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, TRADE_PRICE, TRADE_STATUS, TRADE_TYPE, CREATED_AT, REVIEW_YN) VALUES (STORE_BOARD_TRADE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{marketNo}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{ctpvsggId}, #{tradePrice}, 0, #{tradeType}, SYSDATE, 'N')
